_comment: Canonical registry of named screens that can have a tip card attached. Source of truth for the help-editor's 'screen name' picker. Build-time validation will eventually fail if a Swift/Kotlin call site references an id not in this file.
_comment2: Adding a screen: pick a slug id (lowercase, hyphens) and a human-readable screenName. The id is what code calls .screenTip(id:) with; the screenName is what shows in the help-editor list and to authors choosing which screen to tip.
